action_text: Click the "All" menu button to open the application navigator
rationale: Opening the All menu should reveal the application navigator so I can access the Cost app and its Expense Lines module.

action_text: Type "Expense Lines" into the top search field
rationale: Using the global search may quickly find the Expense Lines list if it supports navigating directly to that module.

action_text: Open the "Choose search context" dropdown next to the search box
rationale: Adjusting the search context could switch the search to applications/modules, making it easier to navigate to Cost > Expense Lines.
If the Expense Lines is available as a workspace or in related workspaces, this could provide a direct route to Cost-related modules.

action_text: Wait 1.5 seconds for the page to finish loading
rationale: The page shows a loading spinner; waiting briefly may allow navigation components to finish loading before interacting.
